verses.arabicText: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًۭا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.translationText: [Moses] said, "I did it, then, while I was of those astray.

verses.arabicText: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًۭا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.translationText: So I fled from you when I feared you. Then my Lord granted me wisdom and prophethood and appointed me [as one] of the messengers.

verses.arabicText: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌۭ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.translationText: And is this a favor of which you remind me - that you have enslaved the Children of Israel?"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَا رَبُّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translationText: Said Pharaoh, "And what is the Lord of the worlds?"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
verses.translationText: [Moses] said, "The Lord of the heavens and earth and that between them, if you should be convinced."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ لِمَنْ حَوْلَهُۥٓ أَلَا تَسْتَمِعُونَ
verses.translationText: [Pharaoh] said to those around him, "Do you not hear?"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.translationText: [Moses] said, "Your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌۭ
verses.translationText: [Pharaoh] said, "Indeed, your 'messenger' who has been sent to you is mad."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.translationText: [Moses] said, "Lord of the east and the west and that between them, if you were to reason."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذْتَ إِلَٰهًا غَيْرِى لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجُونِينَ
verses.translationText: [Pharaoh] said, "If you take a god other than me, I will surely place you among those imprisoned."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكَ بِشَىْءٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.translationText: [Moses] said, "Even if I brought you proof manifest?"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
verses.translationText: [Pharaoh] said, "Then bring it, if you should be of the truthful."

verses.arabicText: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.translationText: So [Moses] threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent manifest.

verses.arabicText: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّٰظِرِينَ
verses.translationText: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white for the observers.

verses.arabicText: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَسَٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.translationText: [Pharaoh] said to the eminent ones around him, "Indeed, this is a learned magician.

verses.arabicText: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
verses.translationText: He wants to drive you out of your land by his magic, so what do you advise?"

verses.arabicText: قَالُوٓا۟ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَٰشِرِينَ
verses.translationText: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers

verses.arabicText: يَأْتُوكَ بِكُلِّ سَحَّارٍ عَلِيمٍۢ
verses.translationText: Who will bring you every learned, skilled magician."

verses.arabicText: فَجُمِعَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ لِمِيقَٰتِ يَوْمٍۢ مَّعْلُومٍۢ
verses.translationText: So the magicians were assembled for the appointment of a well-known day.

verses.arabicText: وَقِيلَ لِلنَّاسِ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّجْتَمِعُونَ
verses.translationText: And it was said to the people, "Will you congregate
